chapters.title: Introduction to Rust
chapters.description: Welcome to Rust! Learn about its power, setting up, and your first Hello World program.

chapters.title: Variables & Mutability
chapters.description: Understand how Rust manages state with strict mutability rules, variables, and constants.

chapters.title: Data Types
chapters.description: Explore Rust's fundamental data types, from simple numbers and booleans to robust tuples and arrays.

chapters.title: Control Flow
chapters.description: Direct your program's behavior using conditions (if/else) and powerful loops.

chapters.title: Ownership & Borrowing
chapters.description: The heart of Rust! Master the ownership model to write fast, memory-safe code without a garbage collector.

chapters.title: Structs & Enums
chapters.description: Model your domain with custom data structures and incredibly powerful enum types.

chapters.title: Error Handling
chapters.description: Learn how Rust handles things going wrong with robust Result and Option enums instead of messy exceptions.

chapters.title: Collections
chapters.description: Store multiple values with dynamic Collections like Vectors, Strings, and Hash Maps.

chapters.title: Lifetimes
chapters.description: Ensure your references are always valid. Master the most advanced part of Rust's borrow checker.

chapters.title: Traits & Generics
chapters.description: Write reusable and flexible code by defining shared behavior with traits and flexible types via generics.
